Task Name: Vendor code field: rename and add AVL/PVL/Approved status indicator
Task Content: The 'Supplier Number' field under vendor code should be renamed to 'Vendor Code'. Additionally, a status indicator should be added to specify whether the vendor code is Approved (AVL), Preferred (PVL), or another classification. These distinctions carry different business meanings and drive task assignments for BDM team members. This is part of KPI tracking requirements for the BDM department.
